claims.claim: Genaro Matsumoto's fights are consistently very close.
claims.quote: it's crazy how close his fights are every single time.

claims.claim: Genaro Matsumoto did not earn his recent decision victory.
claims.quote: he finally got a decision, which I don't think he earned that one

claims.claim: Cody Duran's striking is not technical but is high-pressure and in your face.
claims.quote: Cody's going to pressure forward. Striking's not technical, but it is in your face.

claims.claim: Cody Duran has reliable cardio.
claims.quote: He's got plenty of cardio

claims.claim: Cody Duran has a compromised chin.
claims.quote: A little bit chinny

claims.claim: Alessandro Costa fights with a high, tight guard and is patient.
claims.quote: His striking style, high tight guard, and he is more patient than you expect him to be.

claims.claim: Alessandro Costa possesses significant knockout power.
claims.quote: He's got some very real power

claims.claim: Alessandro Costa has demonstrated a tendency to slow down in fights.
claims.quote: we have seen Costa slow down a little bit.

claims.claim: Cody Duran tends to gas in his fights.
claims.quote: he already does tend to gas

claims.claim: Cody Duran's chin has been tested and is a potential liability.

claims.claim: Ryan Gondra is a busy forward-pressure striker who only moves in one direction.
claims.quote: Busy forward pressure striker. He only moves in one direction.

claims.claim: Ryan Gondra is hitable.
claims.quote: He is hitable

claims.claim: Zach Reese's head movement is poor, as he tends to move straight back.
claims.quote: this guy doesn't move his head and when he does move his head it's just straight back.

claims.claim: Ryan Gondra's right hand down the middle is an effective weapon against Zach Reese's defensive style.
claims.quote: he does throw a nice right hand down the middle. And I've said for a long time the the way to beat Zach Reese is just throw a [ __ ] fast right hand down the middle

claims.claim: Zach Reese is slow with his hands and his defensive reactions.
claims.quote: I think Zach Reese is slow with his hands. Uh I think he's slow with his defense

claims.claim: Zach Reese has poor head movement, often moving straight back when pressured.
claims.quote: this guy doesn't move his head and when he does move his head it's just straight back.

claims.claim: Zach Reese's wrestling is only average.
claims.quote: His wrestling is just okay.

claims.claim: Zach Reese leaves his chin exposed when utilizing his tall-guy defensive stance.
claims.quote: Zach Reese is just gonna [ __ ] use that tall guy defense, put his chin up in the air

claims.claim: Zach Reese lacks the ability to finish opponents in extended fights.
claims.quote: Zach Reese has shown that if fights extends, he can't really put people away in that capacity as well.

claims.claim: Fared Badrat utilizes a Taekwondo stance to maintain mobility and defensive soundness.
claims.quote: He uses that Taekondo stance to stay mobile and he uses that stance to stay defensively sound.

claims.claim: Fared Badrat averages four takedowns per fight.
claims.quote: He does average about four takedowns per fight

claims.quote: he does fade as fights go on.

claims.claim: John Garza is a high-level, technically sound boxer.
claims.quote: he's got really [ __ ] clean boxing. He's just a guy that just really really solid box.

claims.quote: Takedown defense is okay. Hasn't really been tested, but he does do pretty well

claims.claim: Caesar Almeida has very good takedown defense against the cage.
claims.quote: Takedown defense against the cage. Very good.

claims.quote: Takedown defense in the middle. No cage. Absolutely tremendous. And by tremendous I mean horrible.

claims.quote: I'm worried he's been dropped in a couple of fights

claims.claim: Caesar Almeida's striking defense is not great.
claims.quote: the striking defense isn't great

claims.quote: the longer the fights go it's going to favor Caesar.

claims.claim: Caesar Almeida typically hangs in there when he is getting hit and does not get knocked out cold easily.
claims.quote: he typically hangs in there when he's getting [ __ ] You don't see him getting like knocked out cold

claims.claim: Tracy Cortez has not evolved as a fighter throughout her MMA career.

claims.claim: Tracy Cortez's striking is poor.
claims.quote: Hands aren't very good.

claims.claim: Kong Wang has improved her offensive wrestling.
claims.quote: now she has offensive wrestling

claims.quote: seemingly her takedown defense is solid as well.

claims.claim: Eduardo Mora is a better wrestler and grappler than Tracy Cortez.
claims.quote: I think Edward Mora is a better wrestler and grappler than Tracy Cortez.

claims.claim: Tracy Cortez is too willing to exchange on the feet instead of prioritizing her wrestling.
claims.quote: Trace Cortez to me is just too willing to exchange on on the feet. And I think she goes to the wrestling a little bit too late.

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka III is a well-rounded fighter who is good at all aspects of MMA without being elite in any one area.
claims.quote: He's not great at any specific thing. He's just good at all the things.

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka is a busy striker with good footwork, leg kicks, and pressure.
claims.quote: Kai Kamaka, busy striker. He's got good footwork, good leg kicks, nice pressure, great low kicks.

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka's takedowns are solid and he has a relatively solid chin.
claims.quote: His takedowns are solid, relatively solid chin.

claims.claim: Luke Riley is a fast, athletic striker who keeps the fight on the feet.
claims.quote: He's fast, he's athletic, he's a good striker, he does everything to keep a fight in the feet.

claims.claim: Luke Riley's takedown defense is only okay.
claims.quote: Takedown defense just okay. It's not awful. It's not great. It's just okay.

claims.claim: Luke Riley is a more technical and faster striker than Kai Kamaka.
claims.quote: I think he's faster. I think he's cleaner. I think he's more technical.

claims.claim: Cage Warrior fighters can struggle when facing gritty opponents who pressure them and ignore technical game plans.
claims.quote: I do worry with these cage warrior English guys when they get somebody tough, they get somebody gritty and they get somebody that doesn't want to play the technical game, they kind of [ __ ] them up.

claims.claim: Luke Riley has been taken down and controlled on the ground in previous fights.
claims.quote: We've seen Luke Riley be taken down. We've seen him be controlled on the ground.

claims.claim: Mario Batista is a high-volume striker who averages about two takedowns per 15 minutes.

claims.claim: Cory Sandhagen is more active than Mario Batista and will likely win a decision by out-landing him in a striking-heavy fight.
claims.quote: I think Cory has proven in his career he is more active with his striking. He lands more with the judges. I I think that he's just going to be moving, moving, moving. Touch, touch, touch, touch, touch. And I think he's just going to outland Mario Batista to a decision win.

claims.claim: Cory Sandhagen will be able to defend Mario Batista's takedown attempts.
